items.name_cn:
Light Blue
Mon Tresor
Light Blue Leather Mini Bag More Details
Mon Tresor small bucket bag, featuring a drawstring and Fendi metal logo decoration. Equipped with one long and one short detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Made of light blue calfskin. Black hand-painted embossed FF logo pattern. Gold hardware. Made in Italy

items.name_en: Light earth yellow·
items.name_cn:
Light earth yellow·
CALYPSO_ Sheepskin Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian sheepskin, it feels soft and delicate. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic four-clasp closure for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables. With no extra interior pockets, it offers a carefree and spontaneous feel!
Size: 26×14×7cm
Model: 734153

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: Light Gray Peekaboo X-tote
items.name_cn:
Light Gray Peekaboo X-tote
Classic Monogram canvas paired with the Peekaboo's classic rotating buckle. The overall look is both high-end and vintage, especially suitable for a mature, chic style. The bag is very lightweight, making it a great choice for daily work and commuting.
1819B98
Size: 41x16x30cm

items.name_en: Light Green·
items.name_cn:
Light Green·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A must-have hot seller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag features original factory patent leather cowhide, with excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm

SOLFERINO BOX_19cm

Model: 634306
Size: 19x13x5cm

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟
Medium 🆕 3902 Olive Green
Nappa Squeeze Handbag 👜 A refined and feminine new handbag made from soft-touch Nappa leather. This piece is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight crumpled body, adjustable donut chain, and soft touch handle. This medium version is crafted from Nappa lambskin. *Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, extra chain included to extend strap further *Magnetic snap closure *Internal zip pocket *Unlined *lo*ewe gold or silver hot stamping.
size:34*13.5*33CM

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Mini Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse. Features a ruffled design with key details like the signature knot on the side. Stylish and versatile, it can be carried as a clutch, worn with the donut chain strap, or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)
